title: C# Language Core
subtitle: Foundational syntax, types, and operators
description: Master the building blocks every .NET developer must know cold. We go deeper than syntax — you'll understand why C# works the way it does at the CLR level.
learningOutcomes: Explain the CLR, CTS, and CLS from memory
Distinguish value types from reference types without hesitation
Explain stack vs heap without the common myths
Identify boxing/unboxing and its performance cost
Use nullable types, NRT, and parameter modifiers correctly
Know exactly when to use const, readonly, and static readonly
